text: . Yet, what is causality really, why is it such a powerful concept, and can we rely on it for ever and everywhere?
author: User

text: At its most basic, causality is the relationship between cause and effect, where one event (the cause) brings about another (the effect). This seemingly simple principle is the bedrock of human reasoning, science, and technology.
author: Bot

text: It allows us to make predictions and re-imagine situations retroactively to diagnose them. Causality is second-nature to humankind often leading to an understanding of it as a universally true phenomenon that governs reality, Yet, philosophy and psychology challenges this view asking whether
